texto: I wanted what women always want: permission. But he'd had that before this book was even written; it was, after all, the first thing I'd envied about him. It was arguably what enabled him to write the book in the first place. ("Envy")
explicacao: Citação de Kathryn Chetkovich sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I wanted what women always want: permission. But he'd had that before this book was even written;…” articula reflexao, envy, first em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
